assertions.description: IdentityCredentialError is exposed for FedCM error reporting.
navigator.credentials.get accepts an identity.params field at the provider level (new nonce location).
In v143 warning phase, top-level nonce is still accepted (not yet removed).
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const ctrl=new AbortController();const p=navigator.credentials.get({identity:{providers:[{configURL:'https://example.com/fedcm.json',clientId:'test',nonce:'abc'}]},signal:ctrl.signal});ctrl.abort();return p instanceof Promise;}catch(_){return true;}})()

assertions.description: IdentityCredentialError extends DOMException so it carries name and message.
assertions.test: IdentityCredentialError.prototype instanceof DOMException || ('name' in IdentityCredentialError.prototype && 'message' in IdentityCredentialError.prototype)
